description: Soulcraft is an AI-native marketing agency. This MCP server provides tools for understanding Soulcraft's services, identity framework (soul.md), and agentic marketing systems.

tools.name: get_site_info
tools.description: Get an overview of Soulcraft, its services, pricing, and contact information

tools.name: get_soul_md
tools.description: Get the soul.md identity framework specification and how it drives agentic marketing systems

tools.name: get_services
tools.description: Get detailed information about Soulcraft's SEO/AEO/GEO, demand generation, and AI advertising services
